atmosphere.mood: Rowdy but warm. A fire crackles. Laughter erupts from a corner table.
atmosphere.lighting: Low and smoky — oil lanterns hang from blackened beams
atmosphere.smells: Woodsmoke, tallow candles, spilled ale, and sawdust
atmosphere.sounds: Murmur of conversation, occasional laughter, a dog scratching near the hearth

layout: A single common room with rough-hewn tables and mismatched stools. A long bar of scarred oak runs along the back wall. A staircase leads to rooms above. A fireplace dominates the east wall.

drinks.name: Cheap Cider
drinks.description: Cloudy and sharp, pressed from culled orchard apples

drinks.name: Country Wine
drinks.description: Rough red wine from a local vineyard, strong and unremarkable

drinks.name: Harvest Mead
drinks.description: A special batch from the beekeeper's autumn harvest — rich and intoxicating

drinks.name: Water
drinks.description: A cup of well water, clear and cold

food.name: Stew
food.description: Mystery meat in root vegetable broth

food.name: Porridge
food.description: A thick bowl of oat porridge with a drizzle of honey

food.name: Pickled eggs
food.description: Six eggs in brine, sharp and briny

food.name: Smoked sausage
food.description: A platter of thick-cut smoked sausage with mustard and bread
